# HPD.ML.Clustering.ClusteringScoringTransform

- Package: `HPD-ML-Clustering` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.Clustering`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.Clustering`
- Kind: `class`

Assigns each row a cluster ID and a distance vector to all centroids. Output: PredictedLabel (uint, 1-indexed), Score (float[K] distances).

## Declaration

```csharp
public sealed class ClusteringScoringTransform : HPD.ML.Abstractions.ITransform
```
